emails.subject: A resume for John Lavorato
emails.body: A resume for John Lavorato Molly, Please, make arrangements for the interview with this candidate for a trading position. Interviews with John Lavorato, Jeff Shankman, Gary Hickerson, Stinson Gibner. I talked to him in New York and he is considering other opportunities, so we have to act fast. I think John will like him more than Punit. Thanks
